description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named push CI CD that runs on every push to the master branch. The workflow consists of two jobs: testing_job and build_and_publish_job. The testing_job runs on an ubuntu-latest environment with a matrix of Python versions 3.9, 3.10, and 3.11, and performs linting and testing with flake8 and pytest. The build_and_publish_job runs on ubuntu-latest, sets up Python 3.x, installs dependencies, builds a package with python -m build, and publishes it to PyPI using a token from secrets.
